caption: Three people are seated on chairs on a stage with a dark blue background featuring glowing purple vertical light tubes. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and dark pants. On the right, a man wears glasses and a grey suit. Each person sits in a wooden chair with a white, blocky, futuristic-looking base. In the background, the text "GL" is visible in a stylized pink font. Across the sequence, the man on the left gestures with his hands while speaking, his posture shifting slightly. The woman and the man in the suit listen attentively, with the man in the suit shifting his leg position and leaning slightly. The lighting and background remain constant as the individuals engage in a seated discussion.
